creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Almost all November builds show error. I can no longer check if some of my or others' commits caused accidental regressions. This makes it harder to proactively fix stuff instead of passively waiting for someone (including pkg-fallout@) to report before fixing.

https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/?all=1&type=package&jailname=132amd64
https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/builds/default:default:132amd64:021f5c74a690:beefy16#new_failed
